corrections.current: Β πτωχεία καὶ πλοῦτος παρὰ Κυρίου ἐστίν.
corrections.correct: Ρ πτωχεία καὶ πλοῦτος παρὰ Κυρίου ἐστίν.
corrections.note: Section letter at left margin is rho, not beta.

corrections.current: 18ἔστιν πλουτῶν ἀπὸ προσοχῆς καὶ σφιγγίας αὐτοῦ,
corrections.correct: 18ἔστιν πλουτῶν ἀπὸ προσοχῆς καὶ σφιγγίας αὐτοῦ·
corrections.note: Ends with middle point in print.
Verse number should be printed as superscript 19b/19? in margin context; transcript omitted the small b marker after 19 visible in scan.

corrections.current: πίστευε τῷ κυρίῳ καὶ ἔμμενε τῷ πόνῳ σου·
corrections.correct: πίστευε τῷ κυρίῳ καὶ ἔμμενε τῷ πόνῳ σου·
corrections.note: Line begins with a pilcrow-like continuation indentation only; no textual change. Included because transcript may have normalized layout.
Question mark appears at end of following line only; no change to wording.
No extra C before 17 in apparatus.
Correct siglum is A with superscript a, not plain Aa.
Apparatus reading in print appears to repeat the phrase, not εμμεσω.

uncertain.note: A small superscript marker after 19 is visible in the scan; unclear whether it should be represented in this transcription scheme.
The reading after εν μισθω is difficult; looks like εν μισθῳ A rather than εμμεσω A, but image is small.

notes: Running head matches. Main body text is largely correct; most issues are punctuation and one section-letter misread. Apparatus has a few transcription errors, especially v.27.
